title: Getting started with Elasticsearch in Python
content: A beginner friendly guide to connecting Python applications to Elasticsearch, creating indices, indexing documents and running search queries.

title: Flask tutorial for simple search applications
content: Build a small web application in Flask with forms, routes, templates and a search interface.

title: Premier League match report and football analysis
content: Latest football analysis, match reports, transfers and team performance summaries from the English Premier League.

title: Travel guide to Stockholm
content: A practical guide to visiting Stockholm with museum recommendations, local transport advice and weekend itinerary ideas.

title: Machine learning basics for search ranking
content: An introduction to feature engineering, learning to rank, evaluation metrics and personalization in information retrieval.

title: Healthy pasta recipes for quick dinners
content: Easy pasta recipes with vegetables, protein rich ingredients and quick cooking tips for weekday dinners.

title: Advanced Elasticsearch mapping strategies
content: Understand text fields, keyword fields, analyzers, synonyms and mappings for building search systems on Elasticsearch.

title: Backpacking Europe on a student budget
content: Tips for cheap hostels, night trains, city passes and planning budget friendly Europe travel.

title: Python data analysis with pandas
content: Load CSV files, clean data, group by categories, aggregate results and build quick data exploration pipelines in pandas.

title: Search engine evaluation with nDCG and MRR
content: A concise explanation of ranking metrics such as nDCG, MAP, MRR and Recall for evaluating search systems.
